languages.text: "Однако по моим расчетами логическая цепочка связывает вас с раскрытием саботажа, что делает злонамеренный мотив невозможным".
"However, by my calculations, the logical chain connects you to the discovery of sabotage, making a malicious motive impossible."
languages.original_text: "Однако по моим расчетами логическая цепочка связывает вас с раскрытием саботажа, что делает злонамеренный мотив невозможным".

traits.locale_text: "However, by my calculations, the logical chain connects you to the discovery of sabotage, making a malicious motive impossible."
"However, by my calculations, the logical chain connects you to the discovery of sabotage, making a malicious motive impossible."
"However, by my calculations, the logical chain connects you to the discovery of sabotage, making a malicious motive impossible."

languages.text: “然而，根据我的计算，逻辑链推演出你与破坏行为的发现有关联，因此不可能存在恶意动机。”
languages.original_text: "However, by my calculations, the logical chain connects you to the discovery of sabotage, making a malicious motive impossible."

traits.locale_text: “然而，根据我的计算，逻辑链推演出你与破坏行为的发现有关联，因此不可能存在恶意动机。”

languages.text: « Cependant, d'après mes calculs, la chaîne logique vous relie à la découverte d'un sabotage, ce qui exclut la possibilité d'un mobile malveillant. »
languages.original_text: "However, by my calculations, the logical chain connects you to the discovery of sabotage, making a malicious motive impossible."

traits.locale_text: « Cependant, d'après mes calculs, la chaîne logique vous relie à la découverte d'un sabotage, ce qui exclut la possibilité d'un mobile malveillant. »

languages.text: "Ancak hesaplamalarıma göre mantık zinciri sizi sabotajın keşfine bağlıyor. Bu da kötü niyetli bir gayenin varlığını imkânsız kılıyor."
languages.original_text: "However, by my calculations, the logical chain connects you to the discovery of sabotage, making a malicious motive impossible."

traits.locale_text: "Ancak hesaplamalarıma göre mantık zinciri sizi sabotajın keşfine bağlıyor. Bu da kötü niyetli bir gayenin varlığını imkânsız kılıyor."

languages.text: «Sin embargo, según mis cálculos, la cadena lógica le une al descubrimiento del sabotaje, lo que hace imposible una motivación maliciosa».
languages.original_text: "However, by my calculations, the logical chain connects you to the discovery of sabotage, making a malicious motive impossible."

traits.locale_text: «Sin embargo, según mis cálculos, la cadena lógica le une al descubrimiento del sabotaje, lo que hace imposible una motivación maliciosa».

languages.text: "Allerdings verbindet Euch die logische Kette meinen Berechnungen zufolge mit der Entdeckung der Sabotage, wodurch eine böse Absicht auszuschließen ist."
languages.original_text: "However, by my calculations, the logical chain connects you to the discovery of sabotage, making a malicious motive impossible."

traits.locale_text: "Allerdings verbindet Euch die logische Kette meinen Berechnungen zufolge mit der Entdeckung der Sabotage, wodurch eine böse Absicht auszuschließen ist."

languages.text: 「しかし、私の計算によると、論理の連鎖はあなたを工作行為の発見に結びつけている。悪意のある動機は不可能だ。」
languages.original_text: "However, by my calculations, the logical chain connects you to the discovery of sabotage, making a malicious motive impossible."

traits.locale_text: 「しかし、私の計算によると、論理の連鎖はあなたを工作行為の発見に結びつけている。悪意のある動機は不可能だ。」
